"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.default = _checkInRHS; function _checkInRHS(value) { if (Object(value) !== value) { throw TypeError("right-hand side of 'in' should be an object, got " + (value !== null ? typeof value : "null")); } return value; } //# sourceMappingURL=checkInRHS.js.map
